rect.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<rect>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

kreis.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<circle>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

ellipse.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares an ~m:<ellipse>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

gruppe.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<group>~ variable.%0a%0aA group is a collection of SVG graphical elements (~l:circle~, ~l:ellipse~, ~l:line~, ~l:rect~, ~l:svgtext~) that all share a common parent - the ~m:group~. The main advantage of this is that you can ~l:move~ the entire group as one element without having to deal with its component parts.

zeile.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<line>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

bewege.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Moves a graphical element or a ~l:group~ to a specified location in the containing ~l:svg!stage~.

auf.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Take action when an element or a group is clicked.
auf.examples: auf klick Button%0abeginn%0a  index Sound zu der/die/das/den/dem/des index von Button%0a  play Sound%0aende%0a

setze.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Sets the text of an ~l:svgtext~ element.
setze.examples: setze der/die/das/den/dem/des text von ButtonLabel zu `Help`

svg.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<svg>~ variable. See also ~l:create~.

svgtext.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<svgtext>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

erstelle.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Creates an element as a child of the given parent. In the case of graphical elements (~l:circle~, ~l:ellipse~, ~l:line~, ~l:rect~, ~l:svgtext~) you can also add the styles that will apply to the element.%0a%0aThere are a number of examples of using SVG graphics on the [~_**AllSpeak**_ Examples](https://allspeak.software/examples) page.
erstelle.examples: erstelle Stage in Container%0aerstelle Conveyor in Stage%0a  style `x:0;y:140;width:` cat Width cat `;height:20;fill:#ccc`%0a

text.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Returns the text of the named ~l:svgtext~ element. See also ~l:set|k!set the text~
text.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des text von Button3Text in Text
